input_param.name: max
input_param.value: [if (global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly) then 25 else (if (this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level?) then (if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 2 then 1 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 5 then 3 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 8 then 5 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 11 then 10 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 13 then 15 else 25) else 1), 1].max

input_param.name: max
input_param.value: [if (global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly) then 25 else (if (this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level?) then (if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 2 then 1 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 5 then 3 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 8 then 5 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 11 then 10 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 13 then 15 else 25) else 1), 1].max

set_value.name: $debugchance
set_value.exact: if $debuglevel ge 1 and global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Debug? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Debug.$EnableDebugLogging then 100 else 0

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Home config has station+position; preserving both (station=' + $homeStation.idcode + ', sector=' + $homeSector.knownname + ')'
'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': assignToStation disabled -> clearing homeStation ' + $homeStation.idcode

do_if.value: not $assignToStation and this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship and this.ship.commander.isclass.station

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': assignToStation disabled -> removing station assignment from commander ' + this.ship.commander.idcode

do_if.value: (not $homeStation? or not $homeStation.exists) and (not $homeSector? or not $homeSector.exists) and this.sector? and this.sector.exists

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': No home configured -> auto-set Home Position to current sector core position in ' + $homeSector.knownname

show_notification.text: 'Galaxy-Miner: set Home Station or Home Position.'

do_if.value: $assignToStation and $homeStation? and $homeStation.exists and $homeStation.isclass.station and (not this.ship.commander? or not this.ship.commander.exists or this.ship.commander == this.ship or this.ship.commander.isclass.station) and ((not this.ship.commander?) or this.ship.commander != $homeStation)
this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Assigned to home station commander ' + $homeStation.idcode + ' (assignment=mining)'

do_if.value: this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level?

set_value.name: global.$GT_AIParameters.{this.ship}
set_value.exact: table[ $HomeBase = if $homeStation? and $homeStation.exists then $homeStation else $homeSector, $MaxDistance = if $stayAtHome then 0 else $maxGatherDistance, $AutoDeployResourceProbes = $autoDeployResourceProbes, $autoDeployResourceProbes = $autoDeployResourceProbes, $RequestTime = player.age ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Init complete. homeConfigValid=' + this.$homeConfigValid + ', default=' + (if this.ship.defaultorder? then @this.ship.defaultorder.id else 'NONE') + ', commander=' + (if this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists then this.ship.commander.idcode else 'NONE') + ', debugChance=' + this.$debugchance

'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Entered main loop. default=' + (if this.ship.defaultorder? then @this.ship.defaultorder.id else 'NONE') + ', commander=' + (if this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists then this.ship.commander.idcode else 'NONE') + ', homeValid=' + this.$homeConfigValid
'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': assignToStation runtime-off -> clearing homeStation ' + $homeStation.idcode

do_if.value: this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship and this.ship.commander.isclass.station

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': assignToStation runtime-off -> removing station commander ' + this.ship.commander.idcode

do_if.value: this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and not (global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly)
this.$homeStation? and this.$homeStation.exists and this.$homeStation.isoperational and ((not this.$playerStationsOnly) or (this.$homeStation.owner == this.owner))

$sectorStation? and $sectorStation.exists and $sectorStation.isclass.station and $sectorStation.isoperational and ((not this.$playerStationsOnly) or ($sectorStation.owner == this.owner)) and not $targetStations.indexof.{$sectorStation}

$sectorStation? and $sectorStation.exists and $sectorStation.isclass.station and $sectorStation.isoperational and ((not this.$playerStationsOnly) or ($sectorStation.owner == this.owner)) and not $targetStations.indexof.{$sectorStation}
$demandStation? and $demandStation.exists and ((not this.$playerStationsOnly) or ($demandStation.owner == this.owner)) and not $demandStations.indexof.{$demandStation}

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Loop anchor=' + (if $range? then $range.knownname else 'null') + ', homeStation=' + (if this.$homeStation? and this.$homeStation.exists then this.$homeStation.idcode else 'NONE') + ', homeSector=' + (if this.$homeSector? and this.$homeSector.exists then this.$homeSector.knownname else 'NONE') + ', playerStationsOnly=' + this.$playerStationsOnly + ', commander=' + (if this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists then this.ship.commander.idcode else 'NONE') + ', default=' + (if this.ship.defaultorder? then @this.ship.defaultorder.id else 'NONE') + ', targetStations=' + $targetStations.count + ', demandStations=' + $demandStations.count
'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': ship.warebasket empty -> using fallback ware discovery from configured targets'

do_if.value: $candidateWare? and ($candidateWare.waretransport == waretransport.solid or $candidateWare.waretransport == waretransport.liquid) and this.ship.cargo.{$candidateWare}.max gt 0 and (($restrictToShipBasket and $shipMineableBasket.indexof.{$candidateWare}) or (not $restrictToShipBasket)) and not $candidateWares.indexof.{$candidateWare}

$candidateWare? and ($candidateWare.waretransport == waretransport.solid or $candidateWare.waretransport == waretransport.liquid) and this.ship.cargo.{$candidateWare}.max gt 0 and (($restrictToShipBasket and $shipMineableBasket.indexof.{$candidateWare}) or (not $restrictToShipBasket)) and not $candidateWares.indexof.{$candidateWare}

$candidateWare? and $candidateWare.hastag.minable and this.ship.cargo.{$candidateWare}.max gt 0 and (($restrictToShipBasket and $shipMineableBasket.indexof.{$candidateWare}) or (not $restrictToShipBasket)) and not $candidateWares.indexof.{$candidateWare}

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': No mineable wares. demandStationCount=' + $demandStations.count + ', resourceBasketCount=' + (if this.$resourceBasket? then this.$resourceBasket.count else 0) + ', shipMineableCount=' + (if $shipMineableBasket? then $shipMineableBasket.count else 0) + ', restrictToShipBasket=' + $restrictToShipBasket

show_notification.text: 'Galaxy-Miner: no mineable wares available for ' + this.ship.knownname

do_if.value: this.$minerAssignedWare? and this.$minerAssignedStations? and this.$minerAssignedStations.count gt 0
this.$minerIntentWare? and this.$minerIntentWare != null and this.$minerIntentStations? and this.$minerIntentStations.count gt 0

set_value.name: $wareReachabilityRefSector
set_value.exact: if $range? and $range.isclass.sector then $range else (if $range? and $range.sector? then @$range.sector else this.sector)

do_if.value: this.ship.isplayerowned and (if this.$stayAtHome then 0 else this.$maxGatherDistance) le 0 and $wareReachabilityRefSector.isclass.sector and not $wareReachabilityGatherSpaces.indexof.{$wareReachabilityRefSector}
this.$fleetBalancing and global.$GT_MinerIntents? and global.$GT_MinerIntents.{$stationEval}? and global.$GT_MinerIntents.{$stationEval}.{$wareEval}?

$intent? and $intent.$intentAmount? and $intent.$intentAmount gt 0 and $intent.$eta? and $intent.$eta le $intentHorizon and $intent.$phase? and ($intent.$phase == 'mining' or $intent.$phase == 'hauling' or $intent.$phase == 'delivering') and $intentShip? and $intentShip.exists and $intentShip.isoperational and $intentShipIsMinerControlled
not $selectedWare? or not $candidateWares.indexof.{$selectedWare} or ($selectedWare? and $wareReachable.{$selectedWare}? and not $wareReachable.{$selectedWare})
this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level?

set_value.name: $canSwitchNow
set_value.exact: $switchDelta ge this.$criticalDemandDelta and $cooldownReady and (($cargoCommitPercent lt this.$minCargoCommitPercent) or ($switchDelta ge this.$hardEmergencyDelta))

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': No selected ware after demand scoring. bestWare=' + (if $bestWare? then $bestWare.name else 'NONE') + ', bestUrgency=' + $bestUrgency + ', activeWare=' + (if this.$activeMiningWare? then this.$activeMiningWare.name else 'NONE')

set_value.name: $overflowSearchRefSector
set_value.exact: if $range? and $range.isclass.sector then $range else (if $range? and $range.sector? then @$range.sector else this.sector)

do_if.value: this.ship.isplayerowned and this.$maxSellDistance le 0 and $overflowSearchRefSector.isclass.sector and not $overflowSellSpaces.indexof.{$overflowSearchRefSector}

set_value.name: $overflowSearchHomeSector
set_value.exact: if this.$homeStation? and this.$homeStation.exists and this.$homeStation.sector? then @$this.$homeStation.sector else $overflowSearchRefSector

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Overflow mining ware selected by live sell opportunities: ' + $selectedWare.name + ' (offers=' + $overflowBestOffers + ')'
'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Overflow mode but no sell opportunities for candidate wares. Waiting.'
'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Overflow wait. selected=' + $selectedWare.name + ', urgency=' + this.$activeMiningUrgency + ', overflowAllowed=0'

do_if.value: this.$fleetBalancing and global.$GT_MinerIntents? and global.$GT_MinerIntents.{$stationEval}? and global.$GT_MinerIntents.{$stationEval}.{$selectedWare}?

$intent? and $intent.$intentAmount? and $intent.$intentAmount gt 0 and $intent.$eta? and $intent.$eta le $intentHorizon and $intent.$phase? and ($intent.$phase == 'mining' or $intent.$phase == 'hauling' or $intent.$phase == 'delivering') and $intentShip? and $intentShip.exists and $intentShip.isoperational and $intentShipIsMinerControlled
this.$assignToStation and this.$homeStation? and this.$homeStation.exists and $primaryDeliveryStation? and $primaryDeliveryStation.exists and (not $overflowSellMode)

(not this.ship.commander? or not this.ship.commander.exists or this.ship.commander == this.ship or this.ship.commander.isclass.station) and ((not this.ship.commander?) or this.ship.commander != $primaryDeliveryStation)
this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship
this.$fleetBalancing and global.$GT_MinerIntents? and global.$GT_MinerIntents.{$stationEval}? and global.$GT_MinerIntents.{$stationEval}.{$selectedWare}?

$intent? and $intent.$intentAmount? and $intent.$intentAmount gt 0 and $intent.$eta? and $intent.$eta le $intentHorizon and $intent.$phase? and ($intent.$phase == 'mining' or $intent.$phase == 'hauling' or $intent.$phase == 'delivering') and $intentShip? and $intentShip.exists and $intentShip.isoperational and $intentShipIsMinerControlled

signal_objects.param2: table[ $Ship = this.ship, $SelectedWare = $selectedWare, $PrimaryDeliveryStation = $primaryDeliveryStation, $Urgency = this.$activeMiningUrgency, $OverflowMode = $overflowSellMode, $PrimaryCapacityAvailable = $primaryCapacityAvailable, $OverflowFallbackAllowed = this.$allowOverflowSellToOthers, $OverflowDetachedCommander = this.$minerDetachedForOverflow, $TargetStationCount = $demandStations.count, $SupplierCount = $diagSupplierCount, $IntentCount = $diagIntentCount, $IntentPhase = $intentPhase, $Timestamp = player.age ]

set_value.name: $minerRuntimeMaxSellRaw
set_value.exact: if this.ship.defaultorder.$maxSellDistance? then this.ship.defaultorder.$maxSellDistance else this.$maxSellDistance

do_elseif.value: this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship and this.ship.defaultorder? and this.ship.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and this.ship.commander.defaultorder?

do_if.value: this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level?

set_value.name: this.$miner_prevDockedStation
set_value.exact: if this.ship.dockedat? and this.ship.dockedat.exists and this.ship.dockedat.isclass.station then this.ship.dockedat else null

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Run mining slice ware=' + $selectedWare.name + ', urgency=' + this.$activeMiningUrgency + ', overflow=' + $overflowSellMode + ', primaryStation=' + (if $primaryDeliveryStation? and $primaryDeliveryStation.exists then $primaryDeliveryStation.idcode else 'NONE') + ', range=' + (if $range? then $range.knownname else 'null') + ', rangeClass=' + (if $range? then $range.class else 'null') + ', stayAtHome=' + this.$stayAtHome + ', minbuy=' + $minbuy + ', maxbuy=' + $maxbuy + ', minsell=' + $minsell + ', maxsell=' + $maxsell + ', cargoBefore=' + this.$miner_prevCargoTotal + ', commander=' + (if this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists then this.ship.commander.idcode else 'NONE') + ', default=' + (if this.ship.defaultorder? then @this.ship.defaultorder.id else 'NONE')

set_value.name: $strictGatherSector
set_value.exact: if this.$stayAtHome and this.$homeSector? and this.$homeSector.exists then this.$homeSector else null

set_value.name: $currentDockedStation
set_value.exact: if this.ship.dockedat? and this.ship.dockedat.exists and this.ship.dockedat.isclass.station then this.ship.dockedat else null

do_elseif.value: this.$miner_prevDockedStation? and this.$miner_prevDockedStation.exists and this.$miner_prevStationCargoByStation? and this.$miner_prevStationCargoByStation.{this.$miner_prevDockedStation}?

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Slice complete ware=' + $selectedWare.name + ', cargoAfter=' + $cargoAfterDelivery + ', cargoDelta=' + $netCargoDelta + ', stationDelivery=' + $confirmedStationDelivery + ', delivered=' + $deliveredAmount + ', dockedAt=' + (if $currentDockedStation? and $currentDockedStation.exists then $currentDockedStation.idcode else 'NONE') + ', commander=' + (if this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists then this.ship.commander.idcode else 'NONE') + ', default=' + (if this.ship.defaultorder? then @this.ship.defaultorder.id else 'NONE')

do_if.value: this.$minerDetachedForOverflow and this.$assignToStation and this.$homeStation? and this.$homeStation.exists

do_elseif.value: this.$assignToStation and this.$homeStation? and this.$homeStation.exists and (not this.ship.commander? or not this.ship.commander.exists or this.ship.commander == this.ship or this.ship.commander.isclass.station)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': on_abort cleanup start. commander=' + (if this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists then this.ship.commander.idcode else 'NONE') + ', default=' + (if this.ship.defaultorder? then @this.ship.defaultorder.id else 'NONE') + ', overflowDetached=' + this.$minerDetachedForOverflow

do_if.value: this.$minerDetachedForOverflow and this.$assignToStation and this.$homeStation? and this.$homeStation.exists and (not this.ship.commander? or not this.ship.commander.exists or this.ship.commander == this.ship or this.ship.commander.isclass.station)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': on_abort restored commander assignment after overflow detach'

do_if.value: this.$minerAssignedWare? and this.$minerAssignedStations? and this.$minerAssignedStations.count gt 0
this.$minerIntentWare? and this.$minerIntentWare != null and this.$minerIntentStations? and this.$minerIntentStations.count gt 0
